title: The Stanley Parable: Minecraft Edition
description: Immerse yourself in a mind-bending Minecraft experience that mimics the meta narrative of The Stanley Parable
body:
![The Stanley Parable: Minecraft Edition](https://i.imgur.com/HyLF0i9.png)
---
![Spoiler Warning](https://i.imgur.com/mIgOfZu.png)
> _Quick Stanley, close your eyes!_

This modpack contains content that will spoil **The Stanley Parable** for people who haven't experienced it. Download at your own discretion.

![This is the story of a man named Stanley.](https://i.imgur.com/QezWppF.png)

Immerse yourself in a mind-bending Minecraft experience that mimics the meta narrative of The Stanley Parable. Explore a meticulously crafted map created by [RomanSecundus](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/romansecundus/), and also tons of features that this modpack adds.

![New content](https://i.imgur.com/iJNsnVY.png)
>_Ohh! New content? What does that mean - new content?_
 
Here is almost all the features that this modpacks recreate (or steal ;])
- Start up screen
- Title screen
- Music & SFX
- Loading screen
- Remove all the HUD
- Modify the game's font to be [League Gothic](https://www.theleagueofmoveabletype.com/league-gothic)
- Change the yellow concrete power to the smooth sandstone texture
- Tweak the keybind (you can now use E, left or right click to interact)
- Fix the texture pack so it compatible with sodium now (could broke some core shaders)
- A working map with nearly all the content (**I DIDN'T DO THIS PART! PLEASE CHECK THE CREDITS**)
